_comment_trees: Stylized Provencal trees by default. Replace with Megascans paths from Content/Environments/ if desired.
_comment_rocks: Stylized Provencal forest/small rocks. Leave empty to skip rocks branch.
_comment_height: Optional: set height_filter_min and height_filter_max (world Z in cm) to spawn only on terrain. E.g. -5000 to 5000. Leave null to skip.
_comment_offset: Z offset in cm (world space). 0 = base-pivot; for center-pivot use positive (e.g. 250-400) to lift so base sits on surface. See docs/PCG_SETUP.md.
_comment_harvestable: When spawn_harvestable_trees is true, script uses Actor Spawner (BP_HarvestableTree). Delete ForestIsland_PCG and re-run script to apply; or replace tree spawner manually per docs/tasks/DAY7_RESOURCE_NODES.md.
